The tournament is organized by '''[https://www.krafton.com/en/ KRAFTON]''' and features a total prize pool of ₹2,00,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{Tabs dynamic|name1=Hindi|name2=English|name3=Marathi|name4=Telugu|name5=Tamil|name6=Kannada|name7=Malayalam|name8=Mizo|hide-showall=true}} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|1}} {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Stage Host|lang=in |b1=Rohit }} {{box|break}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mazy |b2=Spero |b3=AnkiiiBOT |b4=Ocean |b5=RA1 |b6=Gamezo Tech }} {{box|end}} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|2}} {{BroadcasterCard|position=English Commentator |lang=English |b1=Fyxs |b2=Nekrou |b3=SuperJonny |b4=NekRoz |b5=Saltyy |b6=Icybaby12 }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|3}} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Marathi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Darktur|b1flag=in|b1name=Chinmay R. Sept 18th, 2024 ** 128 teams ** Squad, {{Abbr/TPP}} **{{TextDropdown|title=For League Stage format|section=LeagueStage|width=max-content}} * '''Round 1:''''' Aug 20th - 27th & 29th - Sept 5th ** 128 teams, 16 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into two groups (Red and Blue). ** Each group is divided into 4 sub-groups of 16 teams each. ** Each group plays 6 matches per week. *** Group Blue for first 4 days and 4 days from 29th Aug. ** Groups are reshuffled after first week. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 64 teams}} from the overall standings qualify for ''Round 2. * '''Round 2:''''' Sept 7th - 10th ** 64 teams, 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into 4 groups of 16 teams each. ** Each team plays 6 matches. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 48 teams}} from the overall standings qualify for ''Round 3. * '''Round 3:''''' Sept 11th - 14th ** 48 teams, 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into 3 groups of 16 teams each. ** Groups are reshuffled after 2 days. ** Each team plays a total of 8 matches. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 24 teams}} from the overall standings qualify for ''Semi Finals. * '''Semi Finals:''''' Sept 15th - 18th, 2024 ** 24 teams, 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into 3 groups of 8 teams each. ** Double Round-robin format. ** Each team plays a total of 16 matches (4/day). ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} from the overall standings qualify for ''Grand Finals.{{TextDropdown|end}}
* '''Grand Finals:''''' Sept 27th - 29th, 2024 at Adlux International Convention Centre, {{Flag|in}} Kochi. ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). ===Points System=== {{PUBGM 2023
